units.source_text: 1 在此披露的房地產貸款僅對應借款⼈的⾏業。第141⾴提及的「商業房地產」⾏業包括來⾃不同⾏業的借款⼈，其主要投資於創收資產，其次投資於建造及開發。
units.translation_target_text: 1 Real estate loans disclosed here correspond only to the borrower's industry. The "commercial real estate" industry mentioned on page 141 includes borrowers from various industries that invest primarily in income-producing assets and secondarily in construction and development.
